title: Judge must be guided by conscience, not algorithms: Supreme Court Justice Vikram Nath
description: Supreme Court Justice Vikram Nath on Saturday cautioned that judges must remain guided by their conscience while delivering justice, not algorithms that shape artificial intelligence (AI) or other technological tools that are increasingly being used to assist in judicial work.The judge noted AI represents the next frontier in judicial innovation, and has the potential to assist courts in many areas, including case management, legal research, translation and transcription of court proceedings.
